short_name: Efficacy of Nucleo CMP Forte in Traumatic Brain Injury in Pediatrics
title: Efficacy of Nucleo CMP Forte in Traumatic Brain Injury in Pediatrics

skipped_criteria: Moderate and severe TBI classification: GCS cutoff for 'moderate' (9-12) and 'severe' (3-8) is partially encoded via gcs <= 12, but the upper bound of 'moderate' vs. 'severe' distinction and exact GCS thresholds used by the trial are not fully specified in the criteria text.
Underlying CNS disorders: Cannot be expressed because there is no field in the schema for pre-existing neurological or CNS conditions.
Pediatric age lower bound: The exact minimum age for 'children' is not specified in the criteria, so no lower age bound rule is encoded.
